character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A doctor on board the ship, present during discussions about the crew and ship's affairs.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A quartermaster with a timber leg, part of Flint's crew, later involved in secret discussions about the ship's crew.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A character with a strained relationship with Captain Smollett, described as despising him.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: A captain with a terse speaking style, in conflict with the squire.

character_dossiers.name: the youngest hand
character_dossiers.biography: A young seaman who admires Silver's stories about past events.

character_dossiers.name: Old Pew
character_dossiers.biography: A character who lost his sight and deadlights, described as spending extravagantly.
